title: Spain Trip Aur Hotel Receptionist Ke Saath Ek Unexpected Adventure
excerpt: Main 24 saal ki ek independent woman hoon. Solo Spain trip ka sapna tha... lekin hotel pahunchte hi plan kuch aur hi ban gaya.
content: Main 24 saal ki ek independent woman hoon. Kaafi time se mera sapna tha ki main Spain visit karun. Finally maine apni savings ka ek hissa use karke solo trip plan ki aur Spain pahunch gayi.
Subah lagbhag 5 baje meri flight land hui aur 6 baje tak main hotel pahunch chuki thi. Main kaafi thaki hui thi aur plan tha ki room mein jaakar thoda rest karungi, phir city explore karne nikalungi.
Lekin hotel pahunchte hi mera mood badal gaya.

Reception par ek lamba, handsome brunette receptionist tha. Uski smile aur uska friendly behavior itna charming tha ki mujhe laga shayad woh flirt kar raha hai... ya shayad mujhe hi aisa lag raha tha.

Room mein jaakar maine shower liya, lekin neend bilkul nahi aa rahi thi. Bhook lagi thi, isliye maine food order kar diya. Jab khana aaya aur main trolley andar le ja rahi thi, tab maine us receptionist ko corridor mein guzarte dekha.
Main usse baat karna chahti thi, lekin meri shyness hamesha ki tarah beech mein aa gayi.
Aur phir meri clumsiness ne entry maar di.
Mere haath se kuch cheezein trolley se gir gayin aur corridor mein kaafi awaaz ho gayi. Main jaldi-jaldi sab uthane lagi, lekin tab tak woh dekh chuka tha.
Woh turant meri help karne aa gaya.

Hum dono milkar samaan wapas trolley mein rakhne lage aur us dauran thodi casual baatein shuru ho gayin. Main ab bhi embarrassed thi, lekin usne atmosphere halka kar diya. Usne bataya ki woh khud bhi kaafi clumsy hai aur aksar aisi situations mein phans jata hai.
Uski baaton mein ek natural charm tha jo mujhe aur attract kar raha tha.
Maine khud ko samjhaya ki main sirf teen din ke liye yahan hoon. Agar baat na bani toh bhi koi problem nahi.
Thodi himmat jutakar maine usse poocha ki agar woh kuch extra minutes mere saath spend kare toh kya kisi ko pata chalega.
Woh kuch seconds tak chup raha.
Uski khamoshi ne mujhe nervous kar diya, lekin phir usne muskura kar door band kiya aur mujhe kiss kar liya.
Us moment ke baad sab kuch bahut naturally flow karne laga.
Hum dono ek dusre ki company enjoy karne lage. Attraction jo pehle se feel ho raha tha, ab openly saamne aa chuka tha. Time ka pata hi nahi chala.
Baad mein hum bed par side by side lete hue bas ek dusre ko dekh kar muskura rahe the. Dono thake hue the, lekin ek ajeeb si khushi aur excitement thi.
Phir achanak usne ghadi dekhi aur ghabra gaya.
"Fuck! Main lagbhag aadha ghanta gayab raha hoon!"
Woh jaldi-jaldi ready hone laga aur mujhe haste hue bye kaha.
Main wahi room mein relaxed feel karte hue leti rahi. Pata hi nahi chala kab neend aa gayi.
Us din maine poori subah so kar nikali.
Aur shayad woh meri zindagi ki sabse sukoon bhari neend thi.

title: Cousin Revisited: One Drink That Turned Into a Night
excerpt: I swore to myself — one drink, do the social thing, then leave. Yeah, right.

I was a little worried about her level of enthusiasm given the circumstances but agreed to meet up at a bar near where she was staying.
I swore to myself one drink and do the social thing then leave. Yeah, right!
